textByHash.bc0a088aeec18cff57c947fcf5455fc67266240d: Hello stranger, are you new to these parts? You look lost.
textByHash.903cec1f2ef31807b65ab213bacf1ce508f7e098: I suppose you're here for the fight arena? There are some rich folk fighting tomorrow. Should be entertaining.
textByHash.d26e2d4d38cbedfc7b21243d638d917996944d73: I heard the Servil family are fighting soon. Should be very entertaining.
textByHash.bde794533c2be9e48a9726061b2186a45dbc0885: Hello stranger, are you new to these parts?
textByHash.59743c3757ebb8b4885e670f51f061bf39229aaf: Only Khazard guards are allowed to see prisoners. Unless you know where to get some Khazard armour, you won't be visiting anyone.
textByHash.91d8e560efed90ec4103d308844e813b8d8aca9e: Hey you're the guy from the arena! How'd you get out!
textByHash.cfe0b72af2a622a9d9ad72a2bab80cc139b60042: You're the guy who beat Bouncer, amazing!
textByHash.e544e4d674f27df1a3636fe6dd88e0d777d82fee: That makes you a champion to many, but you'd better get out of here while you still can. General Khazard liked that brute.
